final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded/disassembled layout with all parts spread out and clearly separated, connected by alignment guides or lines to their original positions
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all major and minor components (body shell, sensor, shutter mechanism, lens mount, battery compartment, card slot, viewfinder unit, LCD screen, buttons, dials, circuit boards, screws, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, neutral backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, technical-illustration atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a precise, technical-diagram direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include the name label of each component part in Spanish (e.g. "Sensor", "Obturador", "Montura de objetivo", "Pantalla LCD", "Visor", "Batería", "Ranura para tarjeta", etc.) as callout annotations next to each piece
Constraints: must preserve all visible parts with their Spanish labels clearly legible; all component names must correspond accurately to the real Sony A7 anatomy
Avoid:
